name: Swedish Julbrod (Christmas Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the milk and butter until smooth.
2. Add the egg and stir well.
3. Stir in the sugar and salt.
4. Mix in the cardamom.
5. Sift the flour and yeast over the mixture.
6. Combine all ingredients to form a dough.
7. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
8. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
9. Punch down the dough and shape into a round loaf.
10. Let it rise again until nearly doubled, about 30 minutes.
11. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
12. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
13. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
